name: dragonhack2026
description: Tinder for food. Swipe through dishes until you find what you want to eat.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix dragonhack26-app"
scripts.dev:host: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix dragonhack26-app -- -- --host"
